defaultItem.calloutText: Every surface considered. Every room treated like our own.
defaultItem.imageAlt: A bright, professionally cleaned modern home

defaultItem.heading: Clean, your way.
defaultItem.copy: Professional cleaning tailored to your home — because your time matters.
defaultItem.disclaimer: either through an in-person visit or by sending 3–5 photos/videos. This ensures you receive a fair and accurate price.

defaultItem.heading: Meet the Owner
defaultItem.bioParagraph1: Evelyn started Breeze because she believes a clean home shouldn't feel like a luxury. Based in Ventura County, she and her team treat every home like their own — with care, attention to detail, and a genuine pride in making spaces shine.
defaultItem.bioParagraph2: When you book with Breeze, you're not just getting a clean home — you're getting someone who truly cares about getting it right.

defaultItem.heading: Care that shows.
defaultItem.copy: This section is ready for your real customer feedback. The reviews below are clearly labeled sample content.

reviews.quote: The house felt completely refreshed, and every detail was handled with care.
reviews.byline: Sample review · Replace with customer name

reviews.quote: Clear communication, thoughtful service, and a result we were proud to come home to.
reviews.byline: Sample review · Replace with customer name

reviews.quote: Breeze made the whole process feel easy from the first quote to the final walkthrough.

defaultItem.heading: We'd love to hear from you.

defaultItem.tagline: Professional cleaning services in Ventura County, California.
